fixes.origin:
os.environ["Q"] = needle

cmd = "sh -c 'grep \"$Q\" /etc/hosts | head -n 3'"
p = subprocess.Popen(cmd, shell=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)
fixes.replacement:
env = dict(os.environ)
env["Q"] = needle
p1 = subprocess.run(["grep", needle, "/etc/hosts"], shell=False, env=env, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
out_lines = (p1.stdout or "").splitlines()[:3]
out = "\n".join(out_lines) + ("\n" if out_lines else "")
p = subprocess.CompletedProcess(args=["grep"], returncode=p1.returncode, stdout=out, stderr=(p1.stderr or ""))
